changes_since_last_checkpoint.summary: TASK-091 completed: Ship v7.2 Work Execution Packet

Define the v7.3 Governed Multi-Actor Pilot slice: Council opens a bounded pilot, selects at least three persistent actors, records actor assignment/handoff evidence, verifies maker/checker separation, and closes the pilot through Work Execution Packet audit.
